data.title: Tazapay Raises $36M in Total Series B Funding to Scale Next-Generation Payment Rails Globally; Circle Ventures Leads Extension
data.description: A prominent payment infrastructure provider utilizes innovative digital settlement technology to facilitate transactions across various Asian, Latin American, and Middle Eastern regions. Based in Singapore, Tazapay is at the forefront of unlocking cross-border corridors in these areas as of March 26, 2026. This next-generation platform aims to enhance financial connectivity and efficiency in emerging markets, catering to a wide range of transactions and fostering economic growth.

data.title: Xinhua Silk Road: From consensus to actions, Global South drives int'l green capital flows
data.description: On March 26, 2026, the 2026 Global South Financiers Forum commenced in Beijing. Over 30 countries and regions were represented by officials, bankers, business leaders, and international organization delegates. The forum was convened to collaborate in strengthening financial partnerships.

data.title: Sungrow's SHT Hybrid Inverter Wins World's First VDE-AR-N 4105:2026 Certification
data.description: In HEFEI, China, on March 26, 2026, Sungrow revealed that its SHT series residential hybrid inverter received the VDE-AR-N 4105:2026 certification from TÜV Rheinland. This makes it the inaugural product to adhere to Germany's newest low-voltage grid connection standard. This certification indicates that the inverter complies with the stringent requirements outlined in the updated guidelines. This achievement underscores Sungrow's commitment to meeting international standards and promoting renewable energy technology.

data.description: Borregaard ASA's yearly general meeting is scheduled for April 16, 2026, at 1:00 PM CEST and will be conducted online.

data.title: Fosun International's MSCI ESG Rating Upgraded to AAA, Reaching a Record High
data.description: In March 2026, the prominent index firm MSCI unveiled its most recent yearly Environmental, Social, and Governance ("ESG") ratings. These ratings, formulated using MSCI's newest rating methodology (version 5.0), stand as a reliable benchmark in the global arena. The release garnered significant attention with the unveiling of remarkable findings within the report.

data.title: Developer Michael Lewellen's attempt to exempt software from money transmitter laws was denied by court in Texas. Case dismissed for now.
data.description: Michael Lewellen, the developer of Pharos, announced that his legal team is considering various avenues to move forward following a judge in Texas dismissing the case without prejudice.

data.title: Global Carpool-as-a-Service Market to Reach USD 36.1 Billion by 2032, Driven by Rising Demand for Cost-Effective and Sustainable Mobility Solutions | MarkNtel Advisors
data.description: A study by MarkNtel Advisors reveals that the Global Carpool-as-a-Service Market is expected to see a 9.28% Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) between 2026 and 2032. The growth is attributed to factors such as escalating urban congestion.

data.title: Henkel to acquire OLAPLEX for $1.4 billion, a prominent science-led hair care brand in the prestige sector.
data.description: In recent updates, it has been reported that the current unemployment rate has reached 6.7%, with a total of 10.7 million individuals in the workforce. Additionally, there has been an increase in COVID-19 cases, with 5,000 new confirmed cases in the past week alone. These rising numbers have prompted concerns about the effectiveness of current containment measures and the impact on the economy.Officials are closely monitoring the situation and considering implementing stricter protocols to curb the spread of the virus. Furthermore, the government has allocated $2.3 billion in funding to support businesses and individuals affected by the pandemic. The upcoming weeks will be crucial in determining the course of action to address these challenges.

data.title: Armaf Brings a Sweet Escape to Cosmoprof with their Delights Collection
data.description: In Bologna, Italy, on March 26, 2026, Armaf introduced the Armaf Delights Collection at Cosmoprof Bologna 2026. This new fragrance collection showcased a vibrant and lighthearted atmosphere, focusing on color, sweetness, and celebrating personal uniqueness. The collection's launch marked a shift towards a more playful and expressive concept in the fragrance industry, capturing attention at the event.
